identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a distinct, professional, and RTL-native SaaS platform for the Arab market. Avoid generic 'Bootstrap' looks. Prioritize clarity, trust, and subtle 'AI' aesthetics.
identity.theme_strategy: Hybrid: High-Impact Dark Mode for Landing/Marketing (to sell the vision) + Clean Light Mode for Dashboard/Admin (to facilitate work).
identity.rtl_strategy: Native RTL. Use logical properties (ps-, pe-, ms-, me-) everywhere. No physical left/right.

colors.description: A sophisticated blend of deep slate blues for authority and electric accents for innovation.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-11 px-8 rounded-md font-medium transition-all duration-300 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-11 px-8 rounded-md font-medium transition-all duration-300
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-11 px-8 rounded-md font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors

cards.base: rounded-xl border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300

inputs.base: flex h-11 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Add 'dir="rtl"' to the <html> tag in index.html.
CRITICAL: Use logical spacing properties (ps-*, pe-*, ms-*, me-*) instead of pl-*, pr-*, ml-*, mr-* to ensure RTL compatibility.
Use the provided IBM Plex Sans Arabic font. Add the import to index.css.
Ensure all text is readable. Use high contrast in Light Mode.
For the Landing Page, use a Dark Mode aesthetics (set dark class on wrapper) to convey 'High Tech/AI', but keep the Dashboard in Light Mode for 'Productivity/Clarity'.
Implement the 'Glassmorphism' effect for the Navigation Bar and Modal backgrounds.
For the 'New Website Request' form, use a multi-step wizard layout to make it feel like an AI conversation.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text unless it is a very large headline.
Avoid centered layouts for long text blocks; use right-align (RTL default) for readability.
Use 'rem' units for font sizes and spacing.
Ensure all images have 'alt' tags for accessibility.
